meta.title: Contractly — Multilingual forms
meta.description: Build and share forms in English, Spanish, and Hindi. One link, clear responses.

errors.database: Database unreachable. Use a Neon postgresql:// URL in .env, run pnpm db:migrate, and restart the dev server.

landing.sub: One shareable link. Questions and labels in English, Spanish, and Hindi. No AI in your respondents' way.

features.title: Truly multilingual
features.body: App UI and field labels support EN, ES, and HI so your audience picks what fits.

features.title: Free & simple
features.body: Draft, publish, collect. Built for freelancers, schools, and small teams.

features.title: You own the data
features.body: Responses live in your database — export and backups when you need them.

builder.title: Form builder
builder.subtitle: Add fields, set labels using the language switch above, then publish.
builder.switchLanguageHint: Switch language above to edit Spanish or Hindi text.
builder.empty: No fields yet. Add a question type below.
builder.optionLangHint: Switch language above to edit Spanish or Hindi text.
builder.formDescriptionPlaceholder: Optional — shown under the title on the public form

manage.title: Form overview
manage.shareToCollect: Share your form link to collect responses.

responses.title: Responses
responses.emptyHint: Share your form link to collect responses.
